detectors.description: MoonAmmFeeHook.afterSwap(address,bytes32,address,address,address,uint256,uint256) (contracts/hooks/MoonAmmFeeHook.sol#123-155) uses arbitrary from in transferFrom: collectedFeeToken.safeTransferFrom(trader,address(this),feeToSunCurve + feeToProtocol) (contracts/hooks/MoonAmmFeeHook.sol#144)

Reentrancy in TestnetUsdcAdapter.swapFeeAssetToUSDT(address,uint256,uint256) (contracts/hooks/TestnetUsdcAdapter.sol#100-138):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- routerReportedUSDCOut = ITestnetUsdcSwapRouter(router).swapExactInputToUSDC(tokenIn,address(usdc),amountIn,minUSDTOut,msg.sender) (contracts/hooks/TestnetUsdcAdapter.sol#128-129)
	Balance read before the call:
	- usdcBalanceBefore = usdc.balanceOf(msg.sender) (contracts/hooks/TestnetUsdcAdapter.sol#127)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- usdtOut < minUSDTOut (contracts/hooks/TestnetUsdcAdapter.sol#133)
		- stale variable `usdtOut`
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [TestnetUsdcAdapter.swapFeeAssetToUSDT(address,uint256,uint256)](contracts/hooks/TestnetUsdcAdapter.sol#L100-L138):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- [routerReportedUSDCOut = ITestnetUsdcSwapRouter(router).swapExactInputToUSDC(tokenIn,address(usdc),amountIn,minUSDTOut,msg.sender)](contracts/hooks/TestnetUsdcAdapter.sol#L128-L129)
	Balance read before the call:

	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- [usdtOut < minUSDTOut](contracts/hooks/TestnetUsdcAdapter.sol#L133)
		- stale variable `usdtOut`
